creator: a52ca063@gmail.com
text:
I am now getting this warning for all of my anchors which are updated dynamically via cron.

pfctl -a i_80_cups_scheduled -f /usr/local/etc/walterjwhite/firewall/anchor/internal/i.80.cups.scheduled 
pfctl: warning: namespace collisions with 2 global tables.

This anchor has 2 tables in it, 1 for cups printers and the other for cups clients.


This is just one example, but I have most of my anchors setup dynamically at set times to restrict when traffic passes.  Before, it worked without issue, but after adding 4 new anchors, that is when I noticed the issue.

I presently have 42 anchors, previously, it was 38.
